title: Lists, Tuples, Ranges, and Comprehensions · Behavior Case: Python Sort Key
summary: Model and transform ordered service records while preserving aliasing and order requirements. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python sort key increment in an ordered service-record processor. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use sorted, list sort, key functions, reverse order, and stable multi-pass sorting with clear mutation behavior.
Use tuples and unpacking for fixed-position records while choosing named structures when field meaning matters.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
